headings.title: If you use the desktop app

html:
Getting Started

Status: Active Audience: First-time Niamoto users. Purpose: Install, open a project, ship a first portal.

Choose a path

  • Start with installation.md. Pick the desktop app or the Python CLI.
  • Follow first-project.md if you want the desktop path from project creation to publish.
  • Read concepts.md if you want the pipeline model before you edit config files.

In this section

  • installation.md
  • first-project.md
  • quickstart.md
  • concepts.md

If you use the desktop app

  • Install the desktop build.
  • Follow first-project.md.
  • Continue with ../02-user-guide/README.md.

If you use the CLI

  • Install niamoto.
  • Read quickstart.md.
  • Keep ../03-cli-automation/README.md open for the command map.

Related

  • ../02-user-guide/README.md for the desktop workflow after setup.
  • ../04-plugin-development/README.md for custom transformers, widgets, loaders, exporters, and deployers.
  • ../09-troubleshooting/README.md for common issues.
